title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 221.108 - Phone services, reasonable access — limit on charges to inmates
text:
221.108.  Phone services, reasonable access — limit on charges to inmates. — 1.  Jails shall provide inmates with reasonable access to phone services during an inmate's term of confinement, except phone access may be restricted as a disciplinary measure.
  2.  No jail or other party shall charge an inmate in a jail a total amount for a domestic phone call, including fees and any per-minute rate, that exceeds the equivalent of twelve cents per minute.
(L. 2025 H.B. 495) 
Severability clause, see § 1.1001
